name: Cost and Pricing
description: The pricing model of the app, including free tiers, one-time purchases, subscriptions, in-app purchases, and overall value for money.

name: Customer Support
description: The availability, responsiveness, and quality of customer support for user queries, troubleshooting, and issue resolution.

name: Customization Options
description: The extent to which users can personalize the app's appearance, themes, layout, and behavior to suit their preferences.

name: Platform and Device Compatibility
description: Support for the app across operating systems, devices, and platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, web), affecting user accessibility.

name: Popularity and Market Reach
description: The app's adoption and audience size, including download or install counts and the number of active users on the platform.

name: Regular Updates and Maintenance
description: The frequency and quality of app updates, including bug fixes, performance improvements, new features, and ongoing maintenance.

name: Security and Privacy
description: Protection of user data and communications, including encryption, access controls, privacy policies, and compliance with privacy regulations.

name: User Interface and Experience
description: The ease of use, navigation, and overall user experience of the app, including interface design and intuitiveness.

name: User Ratings
description: Average rating from app store reviews, reflecting overall user satisfaction and perceived quality of the app.

name: Integration with Other Services
description: Compatibility and seamless integration with other apps and platforms, such as email, messaging, cloud storage, and social media.

name: Performance and Stability
description: The app's speed, responsiveness, and reliability, including stable operation without crashes, lag, or performance degradation under load.

name: Regional and Geographical Availability
description: The countries, regions, and languages in which the app is available and offers localized content or services.

name: User Engagement
description: How actively and frequently users interact with the app, measured through metrics such as session frequency, retention, and daily active usage.

name: Accessibility Features
description: Incorporation of accessibility features for users with disabilities, such as screen reader support, captions, and other inclusive design elements.

name: Feature Breadth and Richness
description: The range, depth, and quality of features offered by the app, including core functionality and optional capabilities.

name: Cross-Platform Synchronization
description: The ability to keep data and user experience consistent and synchronized across multiple devices and platforms.
